title: Seeing the Details
scenario: Create a visually appealing infographic highlighting the key features of a new smart home security system. The infographic should be designed to appeal to a wide range of age groups. It should include at least three visual elements showcasing the system's benefits.
constraints: Must use at least three visual elements (charts, etc.)

evaluationCriteria.description: The infographic should have a visually appealing design, including a mix of colors and fonts.
The Flesch-Kincaid readability test score should be between 60-70.
The infographic should meet the word count and visual element constraints.
